# Stderr Validation Test - Verify Error Output Handling
# Demonstrates: stderr assertion, error condition testing, negation

# Test that successful commands have no stderr
exec echo "Success"
! stderr "."

# Test command that produces stderr
exec sh -c 'echo "Error occurred" >&2'
stderr "Error occurred"

# Test command failure with stderr
exec sh -c 'echo "Operation failed" >&2; exit 1'
stderr "Operation failed"

# Verify both success and absence of unexpected errors
exec true
! stderr "error"
! stderr "failed"

# Test stderr with specific patterns
exec sh -c 'echo "WARNING: deprecated feature" >&2'
stderr "WARNING"
stderr "deprecated"
